title: Cash Relationship Manager (Banking/ Financial Institution)
description:
Responsibilities

  • Lead initiatives to acquire new corporate clients and expand the Bank’s deposit portfolio, focusing on deposits and CASA.
  • Build and maintain long-term relationships with corporate customers through regular engagement, visits, and service reviews.
  • Identify new business opportunities through networking, industry associations, and corporate referrals to strengthen market presence.
  • Oversee the full account opening and onboarding process, including documentation, KYC verification, and coordination with internal teams.
  • Promote and drive adoption of the bank’s corporate internet banking platform, ensuring clients are familiar with its features and benefits.
  • Achieve individual and team deposit targets in line with the bank’s overall funding objectives, while ensuring compliance with internal and regulatory standards.
  • Collaborate with internal departments to structure deposit solutions, support marketing campaigns, and improve product offerings for corporate clients.
  • Prepare regular performance reports, track acquisition progress, and provide insights on market trends and competitor activities.

Requirements:

  • Bachelor’s degree in Business, Finance, Economics, or a related field.
  • Minimum 5 years of relevant experience in corporate banking, preferably in deposits or CASA.
  • Strong interpersonal, communication, and client management skills, with a proactive and results-driven mindset.
  • Good understanding of banking products, compliance requirements, and a high level of integrity in managing client relationships.

Please submit your updated resume in Word format by using the Apply Now Button.
We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

Email resume to ken.ng@peopleprofilers.com

postedCompany.description:
Since our humble beginnings in 2002, People Profilers has steadily grown from strength to strength. Our expertise in providing Human Capital consultancy to our clients – universally sought after skills and expertise in just about any sector– has allowed People Profilers to leave an imprint across various industries and build a reputation for competency and expertise.

 

What differentiates People Profilers from every other recruiter is our unwavering commitment to building relationships with our clients- understanding exactly what our clients are after, and allowing us to match their precise needs. We deliver human capital solutions that allow organisations and their employees to succeed.

 

Here at People Profilers, we pride ourselves on being a one-stop human capital solutions provider for your organisation. Our innovative and relationship-focused workforce solutions have been provided across a wide range of industries.
